name: Thrud
research_note: Single primary source (kingshot-data). kingshotwiki 404 for Gen 5. Below 2-source standard. | 9x3x3 update: 2nd source added from lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-guide.html — kingshot-data + lootbar.gg Gen 5/6 guide convergence confirmed on mechanics and max values (tier-by-tier scaling remains kingshot-data single-source for some fields).

conquest.name: Axe Flurry
conquest.description: Hurls five axes at random targets (heroes first), dealing AOE damage.

conquest.name: Brutal Throw
conquest.description: Throws a spinning axe, dealing damage to enemies within range and stunning them for 1.5 seconds.

conquest.name: Feast of the Pack
conquest.description: Lets out a primal howl, increasing the Attack of all squads.

expedition.name: Battle Hunger
expedition.description: Reduces damage taken and increases damage dealt for Infantry and Archer troops.
expedition.scaling_note: Sources describe as range text (e.g., '3-15%'). Tier-by-tier scaling array not available in any consulted source. Max value verified by 2+ sources (kingshot-data + kingshotwiki/lootbar); tier progression is not verifiable — removed interpolated array to avoid false precision.

expedition.name: Ancestral Guidance
expedition.description: For every 4 cavalry attacks, damage increases and damage taken reduces for all squads for 2 turns.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Berserker's Edge
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Chance of stunning the targets. Unlocked only when Bloodfang is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Wolf-Kissed
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Lethality of rallied troops. Unlocked only when Bloodfang is equipped.

order: Feast of the Pack / Battle Hunger first for squad buffs
Then Ancestral Guidance (damage up + damage taken down)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Thrud is the Cavalry multiplier — her kit pushes Cavalry comps harder than any other hero. Pairs with Petra, Sophia, Margot, Jabel for all-Cavalry rallies.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js f2p=false. Single access method (event). Premium investment tier.

garrison.reasoning: Solid with Battle Hunger defense buffs.

lore_background.title: The Wolf-Kissed Berserker
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Viking-inspired cavalry berserker. Her skill flavor text references "Ancestral spirits guide the brave to Valhalla", "Battle fever inspires Infantry and Archers", and the gear name "Wolf-Kissed" — evoking a Nordic warrior-cult identity. Her brutal style ("No plans. No finesse. Just brutally charging into battle") suggests a reckless, ancestors-guided berserker archetype.
lore_background.source_note: No narrative backstory published in any public source (kingshotwiki.com returns 404 for Gen 5-6 heroes as of 2026-04-14; Perplexity search across kingshotdata.com, kingshotguide.org, lootbar.gg, ldshop.gg, allclash.com, YouTube transcripts, Chinese/Korean Kingshot sites, and archive.org yielded zero narrative lore). Themes above are derived from in-game skill flavor text only.
lore_background.source: derived from skill flavor text (kingshotdata.com, kingshotguide.org)

deep_analysis: Thrud is the Cavalry multiplier of Gen 5 — a Legendary Cavalry hero whose kit pushes Cavalry-heavy rally compositions harder than any other hero. Her Conquest tree is a Viking-themed axe barrage: Axe Flurry hurls five axes for up to Attack × 84% AOE each, Brutal Throw adds a spinning axe with a 1.5-second stun, and Feast of the Pack grants a squad-wide +5% Attack howl. Her Expedition tree is where she earns the 'multiplier' label: Battle Hunger gives Infantry and Archer units a bidirectional +15% damage/defense swing, Reckless Charge gives Cavalry a 20% chance to deal up to +100% extra damage on attack, and Ancestral Guidance triggers every 4 Cavalry attacks to grant all squads +25% damage and -25% damage taken for 2 turns. Her exclusive gear Bloodfang adds +999 Attack, +999 Defense, +9990 Health, +111% Lethality, +111% Health, and unlocks Berserker's Edge (up to 35% chance to stun targets for 1 second) and Wolf-Kissed (+15% Rally Troops' Lethality). Her tier ratings: S Rally, A Garrison, B Bear. heroes.js marks her premium (single access method: Strongest Governor event). Her lore is not surfaced in any consulted source due to the Gen 5 kingshotwiki 404 issue — personality inferred from her skill names (wolf, pack, howl, berserker) reads as a Norse berserker huntress archetype.
unverified_fields: Expedition skill scaling interpolated from range text
Lore backstory — not found, inferred from skill names
